# ListHQ

> Australia's only property platform with listings translated into any language — built for agents, buyers, property managers, and investors across 20+ languages.

ListHQ is a two-sided multilingual property marketplace built for the Australian market. It combines traditional property search with enterprise-grade property management, trust accounting compliant with the Agents Financial Administration Act 2014 (AFA 2014), and AI tools including voice search, multilingual AI listing generation, seller likelihood scoring, buyer concierge matching, and the Halo reverse buyer marketplace.

## Key Facts

- Platform: ListHQ (listhq.com.au)

- Country: Australia

- Languages supported: 20+ including Mandarin, Vietnamese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, Japanese, Thai, Tagalog, Indonesian, Punjabi, Tamil, Nepali, Sinhalese, Bengali, Urdu, Malay, Turkish, Greek, Italian, Spanish

- Compliance: Agents Financial Administration Act 2014 (AFA 2014) trust accounting

- Agent plans: Solo ($299/mo), Agency ($599/mo), Agency Pro ($1,199/mo)

- Key differentiator: Only Australian property platform with native multilingual data model — not a translation overlay

- Unique feature: Halo reverse marketplace — buyers post what they want, agents find them

- Tech stack: React 18, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Cloudflare edge, structured JSON-LD throughout

## For Agents

- [Property Listings Portal](https://listhq.com.au/buy): Browse and search all Australian properties for sale, with auto-translation into 20+ languages.

- [Rental Listings](https://listhq.com.au/rent): Rental property search across Australia, available in any language.

- [Find a Multilingual Agent](https://listhq.com.au/agents): Directory of Australian real estate agents who speak multiple languages.

- [Agent Platform Login](https://listhq.com.au/agent-auth): Login portal for agents and property managers to access CRM, listings, trust accounting, and Halo board.

- [International Referral Program](https://listhq.com.au/referral/join): Earn $500–$2,000 per settled cross-border property sale by joining the ListHQ international referral agent network.

## For Buyers & Renters

- [Property Search](https://listhq.com.au/buy): Search Australian properties for sale by suburb, price, and bedrooms — in any language including Mandarin, Vietnamese, and Arabic.

- [Rental Search](https://listhq.com.au/rent): Find rental properties across Australia with multilingual listing support.

- [Post a Halo Brief](https://listhq.com.au/halo/new): Reverse property marketplace — describe what you want to buy or rent, and matched multilingual agents come to you.

- [Find a Mortgage Broker](https://listhq.com.au/brokers): Directory of multilingual mortgage brokers for Australian property finance.

## For Property Managers

- Full rent roll, trust accounting (AFA 2014 compliant), and arrears automation.

- No-login tenant and owner portals via token URLs — tenants submit maintenance, owners approve jobs.

- Bond claim management, smoke alarm compliance tracking, routine inspection scheduling.

- Supplier portal for maintenance job dispatch and invoice management.

## For Investors & International Buyers

- Off-plan and off-market listings available through agent network sharing.

- International referral program: agents worldwide earn commission on Australian property settlements.

- Multilingual buyer briefs matched to off-market listings via Halo.

## Technology

- Built on Supabase (PostgreSQL), React 18, and Cloudflare edge infrastructure.

- All property data served via structured JSON-LD (Schema.org) for AI and search engine discoverability.

- Multilingual infrastructure is native to the data model — not a translation layer.

## Contact

- Website: https://listhq.com.au

- Agent enquiries: https://listhq.com.au/agent-auth

- Referral program: https://listhq.com.au/referral/join
